name: 🪨GORC - STONE’S ODYSSEY
description:
"Silent. Stone. Iconic."

From the primordial ooze of PANGEA emerges... GORC (Stupid RockTM). Ageless. Silent. Unspeakably oval.

12,000 BC. The Pleistocene Epoch rages. Mammoths migrate! Saber-tooths snarl! Humans invent "ouch!"

Yet amidst the chaos, Gorc endures. His mission? Exist. His nemesis? Gravity (and moisture).

When climate change threatens his perfect pebble-perch with DEADLY PUDDLES, Gorc must harness his core strengths: Durability. Stoicism. Roundness.

Aided only by Kork (a slightly lopsided ally-stone) and haunted by the dread of UNWANTED PROJECTILE MOTION, Gorc faces his greatest challenge: Not being picked up.

But deep within his speckled core... a secret thrums. Ten precise pokes could unleash an ancient, gravelly anthem that might just... rock the world.

WITNESS the epic. The mundane. The slightly damp.

FEAR the existential tension of a millipede’s wandering legs!

MARVEL as a stone achieves peak geological performance!

He’s not just a rock.

He’s... minimally disruptive.

—————————————————————

I was dared. I regret nothing.

Don't take this seriously, is shitposting... unless?

Bot for the “Before Common Era” event made by my friend @yeetYeet! Check the hashtag #BCE for more bots!

—————————————————————

Refresh or delete responses when the bot talks or acts for you.

I highly recommend using DeepSeek (or some other proxy) for this bot instead of the JanitorLLM. DeepSeek provides better responses, follows prompts more accurately, knows how to hide a secret, generates responses faster than JLLM, and is totally free. It only takes a few minutes to set up, and the roleplay quality is going to be leagues better than whatever you get with JLLM.
